title: Thai-Style Charred Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired dish featuring charred chicken cooked in a rich and spicy tagine sauce.
instructions: In a large pan over medium-high heat, char the chicken until browned on all sides.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the diced red bell pepper and red onion to the pan and cook until tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tunisian harissa, fish sauce, brown sugar, and crushed red pepper.
Add the charred tomatoes, coconut milk, and chicken back to the pan.
Simmer the tagine sauce over medium-low heat for 20-25 minutes.
Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken and tagine sauce over rice or noodles.
Garnish with fresh herbs, such as cilantro or basil.
